sections.paragraph:
- Original: συνέρχομαι

- Transliteration: sunerchomai

- Phonetic: soon-er'-khom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to come together

a. to assemble

b. of conjugal cohabitation

2. to go (depart) or come with one, to accompany one

- Origin: from G4862 and G2064

- TDNT entry: 13:24,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G2064; to convene depart in company with associate with or (specifically) cohabit (conjugally): - accompany assemble (with) come (together) come (company go) with resort.
